message:
fix(mattermost): extract x-request-id from delete response and add Cancelled error variant

Extract x-request-id header from DELETE response instead of hardcoding
None, providing correlation context for error diagnostics. Add
MattermostError::Cancelled variant for intentional cancellation (not
retryable, distinct from Runtime timeout errors).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
